/usr/bin/c++  -g -fsanitize=address -rdynamic CMakeFiles/Chatserver.dir/chatserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chatserver.dir/chatservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chatserver.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chatserver.dir/db/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chatserver.dir/Model/FriendModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chatserver.dir/Model/groupmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chatserver.dir/Model/offlinemessagemodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chatserver.dir/Model/usermodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chatserver.dir/redis/redis.cpp.o -o ../../Chatserver  -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lmysqlclient -lhredis -lpthread
